results.title: Ensure external file sharing in Teams is enabled for only approved cloud storage services
results.details: All cloud storage providers enabled (should be restricted)

results.title: Ensure users can't send emails to a channel email address
results.details: Email into channel: Enabled (should be disabled)

results.title: Ensure external domains are restricted in the Teams admin center
Ensure communication with unmanaged Teams users is disabled
results.details: Consumer Teams communication: Enabled (should be disabled)

results.title: Ensure external Teams users cannot initiate conversations
results.details: Inbound consumer Teams: Enabled (should be disabled)

results.title: Ensure the organization cannot communicate with accounts in trial Teams tenants
Ensure app permission policies are configured
results.details: Manual control - verify in Teams admin center

results.title: Ensure anonymous users can't join a meeting
results.details: Anonymous meeting join: Enabled (should be disabled)

results.title: Ensure anonymous users and dial-in callers can't start a meeting
Ensure only people in my org can bypass the lobby
Ensure users dialing in can't bypass the lobby
Ensure meeting chat does not allow anonymous users
Ensure only organizers and co-organizers can present
Ensure external participants can't give or request control
Ensure external meeting chat is off
Ensure meeting recording is off by default
results.details: Meeting recording: Enabled by default (should be disabled)

results.title: Ensure users can report security concerns in Teams
